reason: Production deployment succeeded after deploying from a source copy without .git metadata.
publicChecks: GET /api/health returned certificate record 3 and live 0G Chain, Storage, and Compute evidence
GET /api/verify?agent=codeguardian returned tier 6 with token, manifest, and certificate bound to live iNFT 0xa390c79f21a3b4f62f4797308f50f8ff9ea4f4c9 #1
GET /api/verify?agent=fakeagent returned tier 1 with live token evidence and no CodeGuardian passport or certificate identifiers
Vercel inspect returned status Ready for the hardened production deployment
GET /api/certificate/poi-cert-codeguardian-001 showed live iNFT 0xa390c79f21a3b4f62f4797308f50f8ff9ea4f4c9 #1 and no mock token address
Browser check /agent/codeguardian showed live 0G Compute copy and labeled the mock source as optional DA/ENS
POST /api/admin/seed-demo without token returned 403 in local route tests; shell curl to Vercel returned TLS ECONNRESET from this environment, so hosted checks used the browser runtime
GET /verify returned 200 with arbitrary-token verification form
GET /create returned 200 with create-passport preview flow
GET /passport/16602/0xa390c79f21a3b4f62f4797308f50f8ff9ea4f4c9/1 returned a tier 6 public passport
